prompt: generate a recipe app interface with hand-illustrated ingredients that animate into the final dish, watercolor splash backgrounds, timer widgets shaped like kitchen utensils, and progress bars that fill like measuring cups
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed recipe application interface focused on a single dish's preparation. The background features artistic watercolor splash patterns. In the central display area, show a dynamic visual: various hand-illustrated individual ingredients subtly transforming or merging into a beautiful, fully prepared final dish, implying an animation sequence in progress. Position a prominent timer widget in the top-right corner, distinctly shaped like a common kitchen utensil such as a whisk or a cooking spoon. At the bottom of the interface, include a progress bar designed to visually fill like liquid rising in a transparent measuring cup, indicating task completion.
objects: Hand-illustrated individual ingredients transforming into a final dish (central display)
Timer widget shaped like a kitchen utensil (top-right corner)
Progress bar resembling liquid rising in a transparent measuring cup (bottom)
